title: Export item to pdf with similar view as item card
excerpt: We record some data on Monday.com as items, and we want to export these data for print. Currently I can only find out that the item can be exported to excel file, but we want to export it to pdf file with views similar t…

posts.author: Steven_Zhou (Steven_Zhou)
posts.cookedHtml: We record some data on Monday.com as items, and we want to export these data for print. Currently I can only find out that the item can be exported to excel file, but we want to export it to pdf file with views similar to item card. DocuGen looks good but have limit on the Doc number. Are there any other method can achieve this?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Work Docs could work for this, Docugen is great though! What quantity are you expecting?
